channel.title: sorrycc/awesome-javascript Weekly Updates RSS Feed

item.title: sorrycc/awesome-javascript Dec 6th - Dec 12th, 2021
item.description:
MVC Frameworks and Libraries

  • Millionstars5.3k - <1kb compiler-focused virtual DOM. It's fast!
  • react - A library for building user interfaces. It's declarative, efficient, and extremely flexible. Works with a Virtual DOM.

    • Package Managers

  • pnpm - Fast, disk space efficient package manager.

    • Type Checkers

  • Hegel - A static type checker for JavaScript with a bias on type inference an strong type system.

    • Testing Frameworks

    Assertion

  • Enzyme - Enzyme is a JavaScript Testing utility for React that makes it easier to assert, manipulate, and traverse your React Components' output.

    • Templating Engines

  • handlebars.jsstars16.8k - An extension to the Mustache templating language.

    • Articles and Posts

  • Multi-threading using web-workers - Web Workers: Adding Multi-threading to JavaScript
  • this keyword in JavaScript - Breaking down the 'this' keyword in JavaScript

    • Documentation

  • DevDocs is an all-in-one API documentation reader with a fast, organized, and consistent interface.
  • docco is a quick-and-dirty, hundred-line-long, literate-programming-style documentation generator.
  • Beautiful docsstars299 is a documentation viewer based on markdown files.

    • Reactive Programming

  • Highland - Re-thinking the JavaScript utility belt, Highland manages synchronous and asynchronous code easily, using nothing more than standard JavaScript and Node-like Streams.

    • RegExp

  • RegExr - HTML/JS based tool for creating, testing, and learning about Regular Expressions.

    • Machine Learning

  • TensorFlow.js - A JavaScript library for training and deploying ML models in the browser and on Node.js.
  • m2cgenstars2.2k - A CLI tool to transpile trained classic ML models into a native JavaScript code with zero dependencies.

    • Loading Status

  • NProgress - Slim progress bars for Ajax'y applications.

    • Validation

  • FormValidation - The best jQuery plugin to validate form fields. Formerly BootstrapValidator.

    • Form Widgets

    Input

  • awesompletestars6.9k - Ultra lightweight, usable, beautiful autocomplete with zero dependencies. - https://projects.verou.me/awesomplete/

    • Form Widgets

    Other

  • formstars5.2k - jQuery Form Plugin.

    • Table/Grid

  • Bootstrap Table - An Extension to the popular Bootstrap framework for creating tables that fit the style of your site with no need for additional markup.
  • Masonry - A cascading grid layout library.
  • Packery - A grid layout library that uses a bin-packing algorithm. Useable for draggable layouts.
  • Isotope - A filterable, sortable, grid layout library. Can implement Masonry, Packery, and other layouts.

    • Frameworks

  • Semantic UI - UI Kit with lots of themes and elements.

    • Maps

  • OpenLayers3 - A high-performance, feature-packed library for all your mapping needs.

    • Animations

  • Anime.js - A JavaScript animation engine.

    • Misc

  • Logical Or Not - A game about JavaScript specificities.

    • Worth Reading

  • SJSJstars2.2k - Simplified JavaScript Jargon is a community-driven attempt at explaining the loads of buzzwords making the current JavaScript ecosystem in a few simple words.

item.title: sorrycc/awesome-javascript Oct 4th - Oct 10th, 2021
item.description:
MVC Frameworks and Libraries

  • Adonisstars13.1k - The Node.js Framework highly focused on developer ergonomics, stability and confidence.
  • GrapesJSstars16.6k - Free and Open source Web Builder Framework. Next generation tool for building templates without coding.
  • Rete.jsstars7.8k - A modular framework for visual programming allows to create node based editor in browser.
  • litegraph.jsstars3.1k - A graph node engine and editor similar to PD or UDK Blueprints, comes with its own editor in HTML5 Canvas2D.
  • Drawflowstars2.7k - This allow you to create data flows easily and quickly.
  • Blocklystars10.7k - A library that adds a visual code editor to web and mobile apps by Google.

    • Data Visualization

  • metrics-graphicsstars7.5k - A library optimized for concise, principled data graphics and layouts.
  • visjs - Multiple Libraries for dynamic, browser-based data visualization.
  • Cytoscape.jsstars8.7k - A fully featured graph theory library.
  • cola.js - library for arranging your HTML5 documents and diagrams using constraint-based optimization techniques
  • jointjsstars3.7k - Diagramming library to create static diagrams or fully interactive diagramming tools.

    • Data Structure

  • ngraph.graphstars401 - Graph data structure in javascript.

    • Storage

  • pouchdbstars15.3k - Javascript db inspired by Apache CouchDB to run well within the browser.
  • datavorestars239 - A small, fast, in-browser database engine written in JavaScript.
  • Hoodiestars4.3k - Offline First backend to work in browser without internet connectivity.
  • NeDBstars13.2k - Embedded Persistent database for Browsers, nw.js, electron.

    • Operating System

  • os.jsstars6.1k - An open-source web desktop platform with a window manager, application APIs, GUI toolkit, filesystem abstractions and much more.

    • Form Widgets

    Calendar

  • tui.calendarstars10.2k - A JavaScript schedule calendar that is full featured. Now your service just got the customizable calendar.

    • Form Widgets

    Other

  • dat.GUIstars6.5k - A lightweight gui controller for changing variables in JavaScript.

    • Modals and Popups

  • SweetAlert2stars15.1k - An awesome replacement for JavaScript's alert.
  • screenfull.jsstars6.6k - the JavaScript Fullscreen API, which lets you bring the page or any element into fullscreen. Smoothens out the browser implementation differences, so you don't have to.

    • Scroll

  • asscrollstars843 - A hybrid smooth scroll setup that combines the performance gains of virtual scroll with the reliability of native scroll.
  • strollstars4.3k - A collection of CSS List scroll effects bind to dom through javascript.
  • locomotive-scrollstars5.6k - Detects the elements in viewport and smooth scrolling with parallax.
  • elevator.jsstars6.5k - Finally, a "back to top" button that behaves like a real elevator.

    • Images

  • Driftstars1.4k - Easily add "zoom on hover" functionality to your site's images. Lightweight, no-dependency JavaScript.
  • Magnificent.jsstars164 - Zoom responsively, images & more, w/ jQuery.
  • Panolens.jsstars2.4k - Panolens.js is an event-driven and WebGL based panorama viewer. Lightweight and flexible

    • Maps

  • H3jsstars3.7k - Hexagonal hierarchical geospatial indexing system ported to javascript by Uber for geospatial visualization.

    • Animations

  • Effeckt.cssstars11k - A Performant Transitions and Animations Library.
  • shuffle-imagesstars211 - The Simplest Way to shuffle through images in a Creative Way.
  • tsParticlesstars4.2k - A new and improved version of particles.js with bug fixes and many new features.
  • barbajsstars10k - It helps you create fluid and smooth transitions between your website's pages.
  • typicaljsstars1.2k - Animated typing in ~400 bytes 🐡 of JavaScript

    • SDK

  • javascript-sdk-designstars1.3k - JavaScript SDK design guide extracted from work and personal experience.

    • Full Text Search

  • lunrstars8.2k - Library for use in the browser and It indexes JSON documents and provides a simple search interface for retrieving documents that best match text queries.
  • flexsearchstars8.9k - It is a Next-Generation full text search library for Browser and Node.js.
  • Elasticlunrstars1.9k - This library is based on lunr.js, but more flexible and customized.

    • Misc

  • BitSet.jsstars203 - A JavaScript Bit-Vector implementation.

item.title: sorrycc/awesome-javascript Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Data Visualization

  • mxGraphstars6.4k - Diagramming library that enables interactive graph and charting applications to be quickly created that run natively in any major browser that is supported by its vendor.
  • fabric.jsstars22.9k - JavaScript Canvas Library, SVG-to-Canvas (& canvas-to-SVG) Parser.
  • processing.js - Processing.js makes your data visualizations work using web standards and without any plug-ins.
  • nvd3stars7.2k - Build re-usable charts and chart components for d3.js.
  • jquery.sparklinestars1.2k - A plugin for the jQuery JavaScript library to generate small sparkline charts directly in the browser.
  • trianglifystars10k - Low poly style background generator with d3.js.
  • dimple.js - Easy charts for business analytics powered by d3.
  • rechartsstars19k - Redefined chart library built with React and D3.

    • Package Managers

  • npm - npm is the package manager for JavaScript.

    • Loaders

  • script.jsstars2.9k - Asynchronous JavaScript loader and dependency manager.
  • LodJSstars293 - Module loader based on AMD.

    • Testing Frameworks

    Frameworks

  • mochastars21.7k - Simple, flexible, fun JavaScript test framework for node.js & the browser.
  • jeststars40.5k - Painless JavaScript Unit Testing.

    • Testing Frameworks

    Coverage

  • blanketstars1.4k - A simple code coverage library for JavaScript. Designed to be easy to install and use, for both browser and nodejs.

    • MVC Frameworks and Libraries

  • aurelia - A JavaScript client framework for mobile, desktop and web.
  • meteorstars43.1k - An ultra-simple, database-everywhere, data-on-the-wire, pure-javascript web framework.
  • espresso.jsstars534 - A minimal JavaScript library for crafting user interfaces.
  • nativescriptstars21.7k - Build truly native cross-platform iOS and Android apps with JavaScript.

    • Node-Powered CMS Frameworks

  • KeystoneJSstars7k - powerful CMS and web app framework.
  • Reaction Commercestars11.8k - reactive CMS, real-time architecture and design.
  • Ghoststars41.5k - simple, powerful publishing platform.
  • Apostrophestars3.9k - CMS with content editing and essential services.
  • We.jsstars209 - framework for real time apps, sites or blogs.
  • Nodizecmsstars176 - CMS for CoffeeScript lovers.
  • Codystars668 - CMS with WSYWYG editor.
  • PencilBluestars1.6k - CMS and blogging platform.

    • Templating Engines

  • doTstars4.8k - The fastest + concise JavaScript template engine for nodejs and browsers.
  • t.jsstars820 - A tiny JavaScript templating framework in ~400 bytes gzipped.

    • Editors

  • vim.jsstars4.4k - JavaScript port of Vim with a persistent ~/.vimrc.

  • jsduckstars1.5k - API documentation generator made for Sencha JavaScript frameworks, but can be used for other frameworks too.
  • doxstars2.1k is a JavaScript documentation generator written with node. Dox no longer generates an opinionated structure or style for your docs, it simply gives you a JSON representation, allowing you to use markdown and JSDoc-style tags.
  • YUIDoc is a Node.js application that generates API documentation from comments in source, using a syntax similar to tools like Javadoc and Doxygen.
  • coddoc is a jsdoc parsing library. Coddoc is different in that it is easily extensible by allowing users to add tag and code parsers through the use of coddoc.addTagHandler and coddoc.addCodeHandler. coddoc also parses source code to be used in APIs.
